metadata.description: Bigdata plugins marketplace with the Bigdata MCP and skills

plugins.name: bigdata-com
plugins.description: Financial research and market intelligence on stocks, companies, sectors, and economies. Run valuation snapshots, peer comparables, and investment memos; preview, digest, and analyze earnings (quality, reactions, surprises); assess risk, monitor catalysts, and review competitive moats and governance. Covers thematic and sector research, cross-sector and regional comparisons, country and macro analysis, G7 benchmarking, scenario analysis, and company briefs. Powered by Bigdata MCP.
